'''jowagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:kudzued|kudzued]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-w-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kudzued|kudzued]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jowagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jowagithi|jowagithi]] || [[word:jowagiji|jowagiji]] || [[word:jowagishi|jowagishi]] || [[word:jowagiki|jowagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jowaguthuthu|jowaguthuthu]] || [[word:jowagujuju|jowagujuju]] || [[word:jowagushushu|jowagushushu]] || [[word:jowagukuku|jowagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jowaguthu|jowaguthu]] || [[word:jowaguju|jowaguju]] || [[word:jowagushu|jowagushu]] || [[word:jowaguku|jowaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jowagufthuf|jowagufthuf]] || [[word:jowagufjuf|jowagufjuf]] || [[word:jowagufshuf|jowagufshuf]] || [[word:jowagufkuf|jowagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jowagethe|jowagethe]] || [[word:jowageje|jowageje]] || [[word:jowageshe|jowageshe]] || [[word:jowageke|jowageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jowagothotho|jowagothotho]] || [[word:jowagojojo|jowagojojo]] || [[word:jowagoshosho|jowagoshosho]] || [[word:jowagokoko|jowagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jowagotho|jowagotho]] || [[word:jowagojo|jowagojo]] || [[word:jowagosho|jowagosho]] || [[word:jowagoko|jowagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jowagofthof|jowagofthof]] || [[word:jowagofjof|jowagofjof]] || [[word:jowagofshof|jowagofshof]] || [[word:jowagofkof|jowagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jowagÃŸfthÃŸf|jowagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jowagÃŸfjÃŸf|jowagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jowagÃŸfshÃŸf|jowagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jowagÃŸfkÃŸf|jowagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jowagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|jowagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jowagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|jowagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jowagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|jowagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jowagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|jowagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jowagÃŸfthÃŸf|jowagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jowagÃŸfjÃŸf|jowagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jowagÃŸfshÃŸf|jowagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jowagÃŸfkÃŸf|jowagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jowagÃŸfthÃŸf|jowagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jowagÃŸfjÃŸf|jowagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jowagÃŸfshÃŸf|jowagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jowagÃŸfkÃŸf|jowagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jowagÃḊthÃḊ|jowagÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:jowagÃḊjÃḊ|jowagÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:jowagÃḊshÃḊ|jowagÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:jowagÃḊkÃḊ|jowagÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jowagathatha|jowagathatha]] || [[word:jowagajaja|jowagajaja]] || [[word:jowagashasha|jowagashasha]] || [[word:jowagakaka|jowagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jowagatha|jowagatha]] || [[word:jowagaja|jowagaja]] || [[word:jowagasha|jowagasha]] || [[word:jowagaka|jowagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jowagafthaf|jowagafthaf]] || [[word:jowagafjaf|jowagafjaf]] || [[word:jowagafshaf|jowagafshaf]] || [[word:jowagafkaf|jowagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jowagasha|jowagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jowagshÃḋasha|jowagshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jowagroasha|jowagroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jowagmuasha|jowagmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jowagyaasha|jowagyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojowagnkshÃḋasha|gojowagnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojowagnkroasha|gojowagnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojowagnkmuasha|gojowagnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojowagnkyaasha|gojowagnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jowawagasha|jowawagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jowawagshÃḋasha|jowawagshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jowawagroasha|jowawagroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jowawagmuasha|jowawagmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jowawagyaasha|jowawagyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojowawagnkshÃḋasha|gojowawagnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojowawagnkroasha|gojowawagnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojowawagnkmuasha|gojowawagnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojowawagnkyaasha|gojowawagnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jewÃḊgasha|jewÃḊgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jewÃḊgshÃḋasha|jewÃḊgshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jewÃḊgroasha|jewÃḊgroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jewÃḊgmuasha|jewÃḊgmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jewÃḊgyaasha|jewÃḊgyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojewÃḊgnkshÃḋasha|gojewÃḊgnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojewÃḊgnkroasha|gojewÃḊgnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojewÃḊgnkmuasha|gojewÃḊgnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojewÃḊgnkyaasha|gojewÃḊgnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jowfagasha|jowfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jowfagshÃḋasha|jowfagshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jowfagroasha|jowfagroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jowfagmuasha|jowfagmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jowfagyaasha|jowfagyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojowfagnkshÃḋasha|gojowfagnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojowfagnkroasha|gojowfagnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojowfagnkmuasha|gojowfagnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojowfagnkyaasha|gojowfagnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
